headlines.title: As Israel Entrenches, Frustration With Hezbollah Turns to Support
headlines.summary: With the cease-fire fraying and Israel demolishing villages in the south, many Hezbollah supporters in Lebanon are putting aside their annoyance with the group and turning to it for protection.

headlines.title: Lithuania Says It Broke Up Russian Sabotage and Murder Plots
headlines.summary: The arrests of nine people are reminders of the threat Russia poses in Europe at a time when Washington has shifted focus to the Middle East.

headlines.title: U.S. Indictment of Sinaloa’s Governor Is a Reckoning for Residents of the Mexican State
headlines.summary: The U.S. indictment of a Mexican governor confirms what many residents say they had long suspected: The line between organized crime and the upper echelons of government has blurred.

headlines.title: What the End of Saudi Arabia’s Big-Spending Era Means for the Kingdom and Beyond
headlines.summary: The kingdom is pulling back from a costly and high-profile golf venture amid mounting financial concerns, raising questions about its plans.

headlines.title: Trump ‘Not Satisfied’ With Iran’s Proposal on Ending War
headlines.summary: The details of the latest plan were unclear, and President Trump did not specify his objections.

headlines.title: Trump says no ‘early’ end to war, dissatisfied with latest Iranian proposal
US said to be withdrawing 5,000 troops from Germany over Iran war spat
Trump expands red snapper fishing as critics warn of overfishing
At least 12 killed in latest Israeli attacks on Lebanon
Iranian Nobel laureate Narges Mohammadi hospitalised as health deteriorates
Court restricts abortion access across the US by blocking the mailing of mifepristone
headlines.summary: A federal appeals court has restricted access to one of the most common means of abortion in the U.S. by blocking the mailing of mifepristone.

headlines.title: AI robot tech bros dogs run wild in Berlin gallery
headlines.summary: In Germany, robotic AI dogs with the faces of tech's most powerful men are on the loose — courtesy of American artist Beeple.

headlines.title: Iran war shakes Global economy as energy costs surge and recession fears grow
headlines.summary: From energy markets to everyday prices, the fallout from the Iran war is reshaping the global economy.

headlines.title: Kneecap is used to controversy. On new album 'Fenian,' they're leaning further in
headlines.summary: NPR's Juana Summers talks with Mo Chara and Móglaí Bap of the Irish hip-hop trio Kneecap about their new album Fenian .

headlines.title: Several states — and the LA public schools — are setting limits on screen time
headlines.summary: Four states have recently passed legislation to limit teaching and assessments via screens for students. So has the United States' second-largest school district.

headlines.title: BP criticized over surging profits following Iran war
headlines.summary: The United Kingdom-based oil and gas giant BP is facing criticism after reporting its profits more than doubled in the first quarter of the year, following a spike in oil prices since the Iran war began.

headlines.title: UAE exits oil groupings, eyes more output
headlines.summary: The United Arab Emirates is set to substantially ramp up its oil production capacity after quitting the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries and the broader OPEC+ alliance effective Friday, making a pivotal shift at a time when the war between the United States, Israel and Iran has triggered an energy crisis and roiled the global economy.

headlines.title: UK lawmakers reject Mandelson inquiry
headlines.summary: United Kingdom Prime Minister Keir Starmer has escaped having a parliamentary inquiry opened into his appointment of Peter Mandelson to be the country’s ambassador to the United States, as the controversy that has dominated domestic politics recently shows no sign of going away.

headlines.title: US Fed keeps interest rate unchanged amid high energy prices
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON-- The US Federal Reserve on Wednesday decided to maintain its target range for the federal funds rate at 3.5-3.75 percent as high energy prices added inflation pressures.

headlines.title: Beijing invites more to join Group of Friends of Global Governance
headlines.summary: China on Wednesday called on other like-minded countries to join the Group of Friends of Global Governance, following the launch of the group's Vienna chapter a day earlier.

headlines.title: Allahabad HC junks plea for sedition case against Rahul Gandhi
headlines.summary: Allahabad HC dismisses plea for FIR against Rahul Gandhi over remarks deemed seditious and anti-national regarding the Indian State.

headlines.title: AAP govt. wins confidence motion in Punjab Assembly
headlines.summary: AAP government secures trust vote in Punjab Assembly, countering rumors amid opposition allegations against Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann.

headlines.title: Govt. absorbed global oil shock, didn’t pass it on to consumers: Hardeep Puri
headlines.summary: India's Petroleum Minister highlights government's efforts in stabilizing fuel prices amidst global supply disruptions, prioritizing consumer protection and energy resilience.

headlines.title: Ladakhis proved to be first line of defence when country faced external threats: Amit Shah
headlines.summary: Amit Shah celebrates Ladakh's rich Buddhist heritage, marking the return of sacred relics as a historic reunion during Buddha Purnima.

headlines.title: Congress questions ‘silence’ on Ladakh’s demands of statehood, Sixth Schedule status
headlines.summary: Congress criticises Home Minister Amit Shah for ignoring Ladakhi demands for Statehood and Sixth Schedule status during his visit.
